title: Anthropic Wins Landmark Injunction Against Pentagon Over AI Retaliation
author: Howard
excerpt: Federal judge blocks Pentagon from labeling Anthropic as supply chain risk, halting Trump's directive prohibiting federal agencies from using Claude AI models.
